message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.combine for element-wise binary operations

DataFrame.combine(other, func): combines two DataFrames element-wise
using a binary function, with automatic alignment on both index labels
and column names (union). Missing positions are filled with NaN before
applying the function. Matches pandas df.combine(other, func).

Also adds Series.duplicated_keep tests from previous commit.
2 new tests, 843 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
